title: TriQue API
description: A small library mod for compatibility between mods.
body:
## ☕ About TriQue API
---
- **TriQue** **API** adds tags and upgrading recipes for better compatibility between Mythic Upgrades and Warden Tools. This small and basic library makes upgrading Topaz Chesplate to Warden Chesplate possible for example.

- More mods will be supported in TriQue API with more recipes and tags soon.
